# v0.9 baseline benchmark — AFTER A.3 in-place splice template (T8 commit)
# Captured: 2026-05-02T00:02:17Z on Apple M4 (darwin/arm64).
# b.SetBytes wired so MB/s shows up natively (third column).
# Reproduce:
#   OPENTILE_TESTDIR=$PWD/sample_files \
#     go test -tags benchgate -bench=BenchmarkTile -benchmem -count=1 \
#       -run=^$ ./tests/parity/
